options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: starting_zone
options.description: Specifies which zone keys are given for free

options.name: no_local_keys
options.description: Restrict local placement rules to force this world's keys to be placed in other worlds.

options.name: allow_disable_goal
options.description: Enable the buff item that disables Special stage GOAL blocks.

options.name: allow_disable_r
options.description: Enable the buff item that disables Special stage R blocks.

options.name: send_death
options.description: Enable this to send DeathLink

options.name: recv_death
options.description: Enable this to receive DeathLink

options.name: hard_mode
options.description: Hard Mode: The ROM's ring count will remain zero and Sonic still only drops 6 rings.  Doesn't interact with Ring Goal or Available Rings.

options.name: available_rings
options.display_name: Number of rings sent to the pool
options.description: Dr Eggman attacked, how many rings fell into the pool for you to recover?  Will cap Ring Goal.

options.name: boring_filler
options.description: Enable to take the fun out of the junk filler items

options.name: pow_invinc
options.description: Trigger Invincibility power-up

options.name: pow_shield
options.description: Trigger Shield power-up

options.name: pow_speeds
options.description: Trigger Speed Shoes power-up

options.name: pow_ss_trap_flag
options.description: Do you consider Speed Shoes a trap?

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Small Gold Ring with Flowy Writing (Junk)

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Small Gold Ring with Flowy Writing (Junk)

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Small Gold Ring with Flowy Writing (Junk)

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Small Gold Ring with Flowy Writing (Junk)

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: ring_goal
options.description: Changes the number of rings that need to be found for you to clear.  Isn't affected by Hard Mode, is overriden by Available Rings.

options.name: boss_goal
options.description: Changes the number of bosses that need to be beaten for you to clear.  Not order specific.

options.name: emerald_goal
options.description: Changes the number of emeralds that need to be collected for you to clear.  Not order specific.

options.name: specials_goal
options.description: Changes the number of Special Stages that need to be beaten for you to clear.  Order specific.

options.name: final_zone_last
options.description:
Control when Final Zone can unlock, wait until all other victory conditions are met?

- **Anytime:** You can do Final Zone as soon as you have the key.
- **Last But Optional:** If your victory conditions can be achieved without beating Final Zone you skip it.
- **Always Last:** Final Zone unlocks once you have every other victory condition, beat it to win.

Note that this may change how certain mechanics behave:

- "Always Last" essentially forces the boss goal to be at least 1, "Last But Optional" will not.
- Both "Always Last" and "Last But Optional" will add the Final Zone key to your starting inventory.
- "Always Last" and "Last But Optional" are identical with 6 bosses.
- An example of less than 6: "Always Last" with 3 bosses will require any 2 of the Act 3 bosses then FZ, "Last But Optional" requires any 2 of the Act 3 bosses then either FZ or a third Act 3 boss.
